title: Foundation model Unity Catalog permissions is generally available ​
body:
**June 5, 2026**

[Foundation model Unity Catalog permissions](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/model-uc-permissions) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). This feature requires enablement by your Databricks account team.

Account admins can use Unity Catalog permissions on the `system.ai` schema to control which Databricks-hosted foundation models your organization can access. Permissions are enforced across pay-per-token, provisioned throughput, and batch inference (AI Functions) workloads.
